burst fixture

Many near-identical buttons, for a manual/exploratory burst-of-commands scenario against the M2.3 rate limiter. The deterministic PROOF of the rate limiter's behavior is tests/m2_security.test.js (time-injected, no reliance on real sleeps or human click speed) — this page exists for interactive/ exploratory use and to satisfy the "fixture page per adversarial case" inventory in the M2 task spec.
